concerns.text: Task T024 (US2) computes connectivity matrices, but Task T025 (US2) implements memory-efficient storage. T025 depends on the matrix structure defined in T024. However, T025 is listed after T024, which is correct, BUT T029 (NBS) depends on the output of T026-T028 (stats). The dependency chain T024 -> T025 -> T026 -> T029 is implied but T025 is marked [P] (parallel-safe) in the list, yet it logically requires the matrix object from T024 to be fully defined first. More critically, T030 and T031 (outputs) are listed AFTER T029, which is correct, but T029 (NBS) requires the full connectivity matrix and statistical results. The ordering of T024-T029 is sequential within US2, but the [P] tag on T025 is risky if T024 hasn't finalized the matrix schema. A clearer dependency is needed: T024 must complete before T025 can optimize storage.

Task T035 (US3) correlates connectivity with training duration. This task explicitly depends on the 'connectivity strength' metric derived from US2 (T024/T030). The tasks list places US3 after US2, which is correct. However, T035 is marked as [P] (parallel-safe) in the description 'Implement code/analysis/correlation.py', but it cannot run in parallel with T024 (US2) because it consumes the output of T024. The [P] tag on T035 is misleading if interpreted as 'can run in parallel with US2 tasks'. It is only parallel-safe relative to other US3 tasks, not US2. The 'Parallel Opportunities' section states 'All user stories can start in parallel', which is FALSE for US3 as it depends on US2 output (connectivity matrices). This violates the 'Producer before consumer' rule.

Task T014 (US1) implements download.py. Task T015 (US1) implements preprocess.py. T015 depends on T014 to provide the raw data. The list order is correct. However, T016 (confounder handling) depends on T015 (filtering). T017 (sample size check) depends on T016. T019 (output) depends on T017. The sequence T014->T015->T016->T017->T019 is correct. BUT, T018 (error handling for corrupted NIfTI) is listed after T017. Error handling for NIfTI loading (T018) should logically be part of T014 (download) or T015 (preprocess) BEFORE the sample size check (T017). If T017 runs before T018 handles corrupted files, the sample count might be inaccurate. T018 should be moved before T017 or integrated into T015.

Task T025 is marked [P] (parallel-safe). However, it implements 'memory-efficient matrix storage' which requires the matrix structure from T024. While T025 can be written in parallel with T026 (stats) if the interface is defined, the task description implies it operates on the output of T024. The [P] tag is acceptable only if T024's interface is fixed. To be safe, remove [P] from T025 or clarify it is parallel only with T026/T027, not T024.
